recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by at least 2% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The most recent WTI reading (S11) shows +1.74%, an increase rather than the required ≥2% drop, and no signal shows any decline.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price drops by at least 2% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The latest WTI snapshot shows the price up +1.71% at 84.65 $/bbl, not down 2% or more, so the forecast did not occur.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will rise by at least 2% within the next 24h
recent.evidence: The latest WTI reading shows only +1.71%, and all WTI signals (+1.42%, +1.26%, +1.71%) stayed below the required 2% rise.

recent.statement: The price of Brent Crude will increase by at least 2% over the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: The current snapshot S12 shows Brent Crude at 91.38 $/bbl, up +2.42%, exceeding the 2% threshold.
